overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot of a medieval Gothic classroom or study hall with students in dark robes seated at wooden desks. The scene features vaulted stone ceilings, stained glass windows, and ornate architectural details, remaining largely static until a robed figure enters from the right side and walks toward the front.

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a grand Gothic classroom with vaulted stone ceilings and tall stained glass windows illuminating the space. Students in dark robes sit at wooden desks arranged along a central ornate rug, while stone bookshelves line the walls. The camera remains stationary at an elevated position at the rear, observing the serene study environment until a robed figure enters from the right and walks toward the front of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a serene, static observation of a grand Gothic classroom that is suddenly punctuated by the arrival of a mysterious figure. It begins from an elevated rear position, overlooking students in dark robes seated at wooden desks arranged along a central ornate rug beneath vaulted stone ceilings. As the camera holds its steady gaze, the light from tall stained glass windows illuminates the stone bookshelves lining the walls. The stillness of the study environment then shifts as a robed figure enters from the right, breaking the symmetry of the hall. The scene concludes as the figure walks steadily toward the front of the room, drawing the viewer's focus from the architectural grandeur to the moving presence.
